_about: Mock responses for the sub-decomposer eval. Each is what we'd hope Opus 4.7 returns. If the eval runner passes all 17 against these, the scoring logic is sound.
eval_sub_decomposer::leaf_simple_team_sa: {"spec_type": "numeric_leaf", "atom_id_hint": "team_salary", "statement": "The team's current team salary in US dollars."}
eval_sub_decomposer::leaf_yos: {"spec_type": "numeric_leaf", "atom_id_hint": "player_years_of_service", "statement": "The player's total NBA Years of Service."}
eval_sub_decomposer::leaf_contract_salar: {"spec_type": "numeric_leaf", "atom_id_hint": "contract_first_year_salary", "statement": "The annual salary in the first year of the contract."}
eval_sub_decomposer::arithmetic_percent_: {"spec_type": "unary_arithmetic", "operator": "times_const", "constant": 1.05, "child": {"spec_type": "numeric_leaf", "atom_id_hint": "player_prior_year_salary", "statement": "The player's salary in the final season of the prior contract."}}
eval_sub_decomposer::arithmetic_plus_con: {"spec_type": "unary_arithmetic", "operator": "plus_const", "constant": 250000, "child": {"spec_type": "numeric_leaf", "atom_id_hint": "aggregated_outgoing_pre_trade_salary", "statement": "Sum of pre-trade salaries of outgoing players."}}
eval_sub_decomposer::derived_aggregate_m: {"spec_type": "derived_atom", "atom_id_hint": "aggregated_mle_first_year_salary", "statement": "Sum of first-year salaries of all contracts signed under MLE.", "computation_kind": "aggregate_sum"}
eval_sub_decomposer::derived_max_of_form: {"spec_type": "derived_atom", "atom_id_hint": "max_salary_ceiling", "statement": "The greater of 25% of cap or 105% of prior salary.", "computation_kind": "max_of"}
eval_sub_decomposer::derived_named_quant: {"spec_type": "derived_atom", "atom_id_hint": "max_annual_salary", "statement": "The Maximum Annual Salary as defined by Article II Section 7.", "computation_kind": "named_quantity"}
